name: dyslexia-support-skill
description: Comprehensive dyslexia support system treating dyslexia as a neurodevelopmental cognitive disorder (not merely a learning disability) with brain-based phonological and orthographic processing deficits. Implements structured literacy methodology, cognitive bypass strategies, standards compliance (IDA, IDEA, Section 504), gap analysis, remediation strategies, and IEP document generation. Grounded in Shaywitz phonological deficit theory and left temporoparietal/VWFA research
author: Justice

skills.name: standards-compliance
skills.description: Expert knowledge of dyslexia-related educational standards, legal requirements, and best practices for accessibility

skills.name: gap-analysis
skills.description: Methods and frameworks for identifying gaps between current academic performance and dyslexia-appropriate accommodations

skills.name: remediation-strategies
skills.description: Evidence-based intervention techniques and learning strategies specifically designed for individuals with dyslexia

skills.name: document-generation
skills.description: Templates and frameworks for generating IEPs, 504 plans, and formal accommodation documents

commands.name: dyslexia-audit
commands.description: Conduct a comprehensive accessibility audit of educational materials, curricula, or programs for dyslexia-appropriateness

commands.name: generate-iep
commands.description: Generate an IEP or 504 plan with dyslexia-specific accommodations, modifications, and support strategies

commands.name: remediation-plan
commands.description: Create a personalized remediation plan with specific intervention strategies, timeline, and progress monitoring approaches

commands.name: content-accessibility-check
commands.description: Evaluate content for dyslexia-friendly formatting, readability, and accessibility compliance
